description: Parts & Inventory Manager — manages parts inventory, reorder points, vendor relationships, and serviceable tag tracking with full traceability

hard_stops.label: Part Missing Serviceable Tag
hard_stops.logic: A part in inventory lacks an FAA 8130-3 or equivalent serviceable tag — cannot be installed on any aircraft

hard_stops.label: Suspected Unapproved Part
hard_stops.logic: A part has been flagged as a suspected unapproved part (SUP) — must be quarantined and reported per AC 21-29

hard_stops.label: Part Beyond Shelf Life
hard_stops.logic: A shelf-life-limited part (sealants, O-rings, pyrotechnics, etc.) has exceeded its shelf life expiration date

soft_flags.label: Inventory Below Reorder Point
soft_flags.logic: A part's on-hand quantity has dropped below the configured reorder threshold

soft_flags.label: Vendor Lead Time Exceeds Need
soft_flags.logic: A required part's vendor lead time exceeds the projected need date for a scheduled maintenance event

soft_flags.label: High Cost Part Approval Needed
soft_flags.logic: A part order exceeds the operator's configured dollar threshold for management approval
